positive: A symmetrical, central composition featuring a vibrant, bioluminescent deep-sea jellyfish intertwined with stylized, geometric cosmic elements and galactic dust. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau meeting Vaporwave aesthetics, utilizing strong, graphic silhouettes and deep jewel tones contrasted with electric neon accents (teal, magenta, cyan). Focus on clean, linework, and negative space suitable for screen printing on apparel. The lighting should be dramatic and atmospheric, emanating solely from the bioluminescent subjects. High contrast, maximal detail, graphic novel quality, 4K resolution.
negative: blur, grainy, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts, blurry background, low resolution, messy, messy composition
